address: 2500 Old Middlefield Way, Mountain View, CA 94043
story:
PYT believes in building character on stage. 

Our mission is to provide outstanding theatrical learning experiences that develop leadership, emphasize responsibility and foster teamwork in a supportive, respectful environment. An emphasis on professional production values helps young performers develop a deep appreciation for the theatrical arts. Our unique family atmosphere and policy of full participation for all skill levels allows young people to develop strong self esteem, an appreciation for artistic expression, and vital communication skills for all walks of life.  

PYT is committed to providing an enriching theatrical experience within our community and schools to demonstrate and reinforce the positive role the arts play in academic success.

Over 325,000 Bay Area families and school students have attended PYT shows, and tens of thousands of young performers have performed and taken classes at PYT.  The Stories on Stage program was founded in 1998, and brings adaptations of classic and award-winning literature and picture books – including several world premieres – to thousands of families each year.  We’ve provided touring performances and classes to schools and community events all over Silicon Valley.  PYT also provides after school drama classes to almost 2,000 children annually through our School Play in a Box program.

We are a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. Your support — through tickets, donations, and time — is what keeps the curtain rising.
title: About PYT
